reportModal.title: Report {{targetType}}
reportModal.disclaimer: Reporting is a serious action reviewed by staff. Please only report content that genuinely violates our community guidelines — unjustified or repeated misuse of reporting can lead to restrictions on your own account.
reportModal.reasonPlaceholder: Explain what's wrong with this content or profile field
reportModal.reasonTooShort: Please provide a bit more detail (at least 10 characters)
reportModal.successMessage: Thank you, staff will review your report.
reportModal.errorMessage: Something went wrong while submitting your report. Please try again.
